title: paspalum pygmaeum
intro: Paspalum pygmaeum, also known as Dwarf Paspalum, is a small, perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paspalum pygmaeum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
